name: Zero Risk — RUFLO Smart Router (Webhook)
description: Entry point for all incoming requests. Invokes RUFLO orchestrator-classifier to determine request type (depth-first | breadth-first | straightforward), spawns appropriate agent chain, logs routing decision, returns async request_id for tracking. Validates client context from Client Brain before routing.
trigger: Webhook POST /webhook/router-entry with { client_id, request, context_type }
kpis: Request classification accuracy (depth vs breadth vs straightforward)
Average routing latency (<2s for straightforward, <5s for complex)
Agent chain execution success rate by classification type
